item.title: F-003a: Rich Text Rendering (Core)
item.intent: Core markdown-to-styled-text rendering: headings, bold, italic, lists, blockquotes, code spans. The foundation that makes writing feel beautiful. Tables, images, interactive elements, and source toggle are separate items.
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-038 (Parser), FEAT-039 (Text Engine). Render AST nodes as attributed text: 6 heading levels, bold/italic/strikethrough inline, ordered/unordered lists with indentation, blockquotes with left border, code spans with monospace+background, horizontal rules, paragraph spacing. Performance: <16ms render, 120fps scroll. Malformed markdown renders best-effort.
acceptanceCriteria: User writes markdown and sees styled output in real time
Toggling to source shows valid markdown, round-trip preserves content perfectly
CJK, RTL text, accented characters, and emoji render and edit correctly
All 6 heading levels render at distinct sizes and weights
Bold, italic, strikethrough render inline with syntax chars hidden in rich view
Nested lists render with correct indentation up to 4 levels
Keystroke-to-render under 16ms measured via Instruments on iPhone 15
5000-line doc scrolls at 120fps on ProMotion with zero dropped frames
Malformed markdown renders best-effort without crash or blank screen
